# Code Headers

## Required Header

```text
Project:      <PROJECT_NAME>
File:         <FILENAME>
Purpose:      <One-sentence description>
Language:     <Python|Bash|Go|Rust|TypeScript|etc.>

License:      FSL-1.1-ALv2
Copyright:    (c) <YEAR> HYPERI PTY LIMITED
```

Optional: `Description:` (multi-line) and `Notes:` blocks after copyright.

## NEVER Include in Headers

| ❌ Field | Why |
|----------|-----|
| Version numbers | Use CHANGELOG.md / git tags |
| Change dates | Use git history |
| Author names | Always `HYPERI PTY LIMITED` |
| Modification history | Use git |

## Placement

- **Top of file**, before any code
- After shebang (`#!/usr/bin/env bash`) for scripts
- Before module docstrings (Python) / package declarations (Go)

## Language Comment Syntax

| Language | Style |
|----------|-------|
| Python | `#  Project:` … |
| Rust | `//! Project:` … |
| Go | `// Project:` … |
| Bash | `#  Project:` … (after shebang) |
| TypeScript | `/** Project:` … `*/` |

## AI Rules

- New files: `FSL-1.1-ALv2`, current year, `HYPERI PTY LIMITED`, correct comment syntax
- Existing files: preserve header; add if missing; update `Purpose` only if semantics changed
- REUSE/SPDX 3.3 compliant — machine-readable identifiers required
